title: Amtech I9400 Double cylinder foot pump with gauge
features: DURABLE AND EASY TO USE: This double cylinder bike foot pump is made from steel and has a wide, non-slip tread plate for ease of use
FAST INFLATION: It has a pressure gauge marked 0 - 100 PSI and 0 - 7kg/cm2 and a twin barrel for faster inflation
VERSATILE: With a braided 500mm (20") delivery hose with a thumb lock Schrader valve connector, it is supplied with three adaptors, suitable for bicycle tyres, sports balls and inflatables
TRADE READY: Suitable for both home users and professional tradespeople
WIDE APPLICATION: Useful for a range of repair, assembly, and maintenance jobs
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 1x Double footpump with gauge See more
